case_title: NEW CHECK STOP VS FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY NEW CHECK STOP AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW CHECK STOP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,045.00, DEFENDANT'S NAME IS CHANGED TO FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE IN PLACE OF FARMER INSURANCE GROUP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
